query_text: Design Experiments: Theoretical and Methodological Challenges in Creating Complex Interventions in Classroom Settings Brown AL 1992 10.1207/s15327809jls0202_2
title: Design Experiments: Theoretical and Methodological Challenges in Creating Complex Interventions in Classroom Settings
rationale: Most-cited paper in JLS (2800+ citations). Establishes design-based research as the canonical methodology for testing LE interventions in authentic classrooms. Directly addresses gap g_008: T17 needs DBR academic anchors.

query_text: The State of Educational Data Mining in 2009: A Review and Future Visions Baker RSJ Yacef K 2009 10.5281/zenodo.3554658
title: The State of Educational Data Mining in 2009: A Review and Future Visions
rationale: 1500+ citations. Codified EDM as a distinct discipline with its own methods and taxonomy. T04 currently has zero academic papers; this is the field-defining anchor. Distinct from Romero & Ventura 2010 (LE-T1-009) which is a general review — Baker & Yacef 2009 is the constitutive naming act for EDM.

query_text: Knowledge Tracing: Modeling the Acquisition of Procedural Knowledge Corbett AT Anderson JR 1994 10.1007/BF01099821
title: Knowledge Tracing: Modeling the Acquisition of Procedural Knowledge
rationale: 2500+ citations. Formal presentation of Bayesian Knowledge Tracing (BKT) — the dominant probabilistic student model still deployed in production ITS worldwide. The algorithm behind all competency mastery tracking in modern adaptive learning systems.

query_text: Cognitive Tutors: Lessons Learned Anderson JR Corbett AT Koedinger KR Pelletier R 1995 10.1207/s15327809jls0402_2
title: Cognitive Tutors: Lessons Learned
authors: Anderson JR, Corbett AT, Koedinger KR, Pelletier R
rationale: 1800+ citations. Decade synthesis of Cognitive Tutor development: ACT-R production rules, BKT, empirical learning gains in real schools. One of the most influential synthesis papers in ITS. Any one-hop from this will surface the surrounding cognitive tutor and ITS literature.

query_text: Cognitive load during problem solving: Effects on learning Sweller J 1988 10.1207/s15516709cog1202_4
title: Cognitive load during problem solving: Effects on learning
rationale: 4000+ citations. The founding paper of Cognitive Load Theory — most replicated finding in educational psychology and a standard LE design rule. T01 currently has zero academic papers; LE-T1-006 is the 2019 Sweller textbook; this 1988 paper is the citation hub for the entire CLT empirical literature. One-hop will recover worked-examples, split-attention, and redundancy effect papers.

query_text: Abstract planning and perceptual chunks: Elements of expertise in geometry Koedinger KR Anderson JR 1990 10.1207/s15516709cog1404_2
title: Abstract planning and perceptual chunks: Elements of expertise in geometry
rationale: 650+ citations. Foundational paper encoding domain expertise as production rules for ITS — the methodological basis for Cognitive Tutor. One-hop will surface the expertise modeling and ITS knowledge-component literature.

query_text: SOAR: An Architecture for General Intelligence Laird JE Newell A Rosenbloom PS 1987 10.1016/0004-3702(87)90050-6
title: SOAR: An Architecture for General Intelligence
authors: Laird JE, Newell A, Rosenbloom PS
rationale: 5000+ citations. Established SOAR and the chunking mechanism — a computational model of procedural skill acquisition from practice. Provides T01 with its cognitive architecture anchor alongside CLT. One-hop from SOAR will surface cognitive architecture, ACT-R, and problem-solving literature foundational to ITS design.
